framework.name: IETF OBO Nested Claims for Chained Delegation
framework.description: Scalekit describes using nested JWT claims (sub + act.sub) to represent multi-hop delegation chains like user→InfraBot→ArgoCD→AWS. Each hop's identity is encoded in nested claim layers, with scope filtering at each level. This is the closest any production-oriented guide gets to agent-to-agent delegation representation in tokens.
framework.raw_quote: You can support this by nesting claims inside each other to reflect the delegation depth

source.title: Understanding "On-Behalf-Of" in AI agent authentication - Scalekit
